heading: Determination of entitlement; maximum amount; Presidential approval; conclusiveness
label: 3072 Determination of entitlement; maximum amount; Presidential approval; conclusiveness
text: The Attorney General shall determine whether an individual furnishing information described in section 3071 is entitled to a reward and the amount to be paid.
notes: Amendments2002—, which directed amendment of section 3072 of chapter 203, was executed to this section, which is in chapter 204, by striking out at end “A reward under this section may be in an amount not to exceed $500,000. A reward of $100,000 or more may not be made without the approval of the President or the Attorney General personally. A determination made by the Attorney General or the President under this chapter shall be final and conclusive, and no court shall have power or jurisdiction to review it.”Pub. L. 107–273
